center.name: 沙拉瓦特山脈
center.summary: 沙拉瓦特山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Arabian woodpecker、葉門鶇、Arabian serin，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Sarawat Mountains of western Saudi Arabia and Yemen

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | Grainy picture of the Arabian woodpecker perched on a tree branch.]] The Arabian woodpecker (Dendrocoptes dorae) or Sarat woodpecker, is a bird species of the family Picidae, native to the Sarawat Mountains of Saudi Arabia and Yemen

birds.evidence: It is native to the Sarawat Mountains of the western Arabian Peninsula
